option.name: SCRIPT_TEXT
option.value: Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .\xladmin-backend\dist, .\xladmin-backend\build, .\xladmin-frontend\dist, .\xladmin-frontend\.tmp-types -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .\xladmin-backend\src\*.egg-info -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Force .\xladmin-frontend\*.tgz -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
